/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libpkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/pkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/pkg_srv/srv/mission_control__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib
